/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmaster_ros2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libmaster_ros2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/master_ros2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/master_ros2_interface/msg/custom_msg__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/master_ros2_ws/build/master_ros2_interface:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libmaster_ros2_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
